title: Kondapalli Fort
tagline: Kondapalli Fort — heritage city of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Kondapalli Fort, also locally known as Kondapalli Kota and Kondapalli Quilla, lies to the west of Kondapalli in Ibrahimpatnam mandal of NTR district in Andhra Pradesh, India was bu
overview.description: Kondapalli Fort, also locally known as Kondapalli Kota and Kondapalli Quilla, lies to the west of Kondapalli in Ibrahimpatnam mandal of NTR district in Andhra Pradesh, India was built by Prolaya Vema Reddy of Reddi Kingdom during the 14th century CE. It was initially built as a leisure place and business center and later served as a military training base for the British rulers. According to some other historians it was built in 1360 CE by Anna Vema Reddy after he captured Kondapalli from Mudigonda Chalukyas, the fort has been home to several dynasties, from the Reddi rulers Gajapati dynasty t

topPlaces.name: Kondapalli
topPlaces.description: Kondapalli is an industrial and residential hub situated in the western part of Vijayawada in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. Dr Narla Tata Rao Thermal Power Station also known as Vijayawada Thermal Power Station (VTPS) is one of the major Thermal Power stations of the state is located in between Ibrahimpatnam and Kondapalli.

topPlaces.name: Ibrahimpatnam
topPlaces.description: Ibrahimpatnam (known locally as IBM) is a part of Vijayawada in NTR district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is also the mandal headquarters of Ibrahimpatnam mandal.

topPlaces.name: Budameru Rivulet
topPlaces.description: Budameru is a rivulet in NTR district which originates in the hills surrounding Mylavaram and empties itself into Kolleru Lake. Budameru is also known as The Sorrow of Vijayawada.

topPlaces.name: Dr. Narla Tata Rao Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: Dr. Narla Tata Rao Thermal Power Station or Vijayawada Thermal Power Plant is located at Vijayawada in Andhra Pradesh.

image.alt: Dr. Narla Tata Rao Thermal Power Station

topPlaces.name: Elaprolu
topPlaces.description: Elaprolu is a village in NTR district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Ibrahimpatnam mandal of Vijayawada revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kavuluru
topPlaces.description: Kavuluru is a village near Vijayawada and Kondapalli in the NTR district of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Tummalapalem
topPlaces.description: Tummalapalem is located in western part of Vijayawada in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is a village falls under Ibrahimpatnam mandal in Vijayawada revenue division of NTR district.

topPlaces.name: ACA–KDCA Cricket Ground
topPlaces.description: ACA–KDCA Cricket Ground (or Andhra Cricket Association–Krishna District Cricket Association Ground) is the common name for series of two cricket grounds located in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in the village of Mulapadu of NTR district, near Vijayawada.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kondapalli Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kondapalli Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kondapalli Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (16 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kondapalli Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kondapalli Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kondapalli Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kondapalli Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kondapalli Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kondapalli, Ibrahimpatnam, Budameru Rivulet, Dr. Narla Tata Rao Thermal Power Station, Elaprolu.
